title: BERRY UPL MONITOR — UNAUTHORIZED PRACTICE OF LAW

indicators.indicator: Berry drafting or ghost-writing Emily's legal filings
indicators.evidence_type: Writing style analysis — compare pre/post Barnes withdrawal

Berry researching law and preparing legal arguments for Emily
indicators.evidence_type: Electronic evidence of legal research on Emily's behalf

detection_methods.description: Compare Emily's pre-Barnes and post-Barnes filings. If legal sophistication suddenly increases without attorney, someone is helping.
detection_methods.tool: Use linguistic analysis tools — sentence complexity, legal terminology density, citation accuracy

detection_methods.description: Serve interrogatories asking Emily: 'Who assisted in preparing this filing?' — she must answer under oath
Note if Berry whispers to Emily during hearings, passes notes, or speaks to court staff
Subpoena Emily's email/text for communications with Berry about legal matters
If Emily's filings are electronic, check document metadata for author name
detection_methods.note: PDF properties often show original author

action_plan.action: Document every suspected UPL indicator with dates and evidence
File formal UPL complaint with State Bar of Michigan
Notify circuit court judge of suspected UPL
action_plan.authority: Court has inherent authority to prevent UPL in proceedings

action_plan.action: Include UPL in federal §1983 complaint as evidence of conspiracy
action_plan.theory: Berry's UPL shows coordinated effort to deprive Andrew's rights

action_plan.action: Serve discovery specifically targeting Berry's involvement
action_plan.note: Berry is NOT Emily's attorney — no privilege for Berry communications
